channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.mmorpg.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.mmorpg.com

item.title: Enshrouded's New 'Forging The Path' Update Brings Custom Map Sharing, Combat Changes And More On Path To 1.0
item.content:encoded:
As the Enshrouded team works towards a 1.0 release this year, the fantasy survival RPG gets its eighth big update. Titled “Forging The Path,” this patch focuses on building up the foundations for the full release, including combat reworks, Adventure sharing, a progression overhaul and more. 

The long-awaited Aventure Sharing feature arrives with this update, allowing players to officially share and download others’ custom map creations by navigating to the feature through the main menu. While there are some limitations for now, the team says they’ll be lifting those as things develop. 

For those who are curious about starting Enshrouded up now with 1.0 in the horizon, they’ve done some upgrades to the early game experience. Not only are there better visuals in these areas, but the map and tutorials have also been tidied up to give more of a ramp-up into learning new gameplay elements. 

A ton of practical gameplay changes have been made to make things more exciting. All weapons, and even axes for mining and woodchopping, will now receive special abilities that are tapped into through a “focus” bar. Melee weapons will have their own new heavy attacks activated by holding the attack button, and mages are getting mild buffs, with heavier changes coming for the 1.0 release. 

Enshrouded’s progression and skill systems also see a huge overhaul in Update 8. Namely, in order to add easier progression towards higher-tier skills, there’ll be weaker but cheaper versions of the skills that can be leveled up to count towards the skill tree progression. Some gear will also allow their own skill progressions through upgrades. In preparation for this, all skill points have been refunded to players. 

Some other quality-of-life changes have been added, too, including an item that quick-sorts everything in your boxes, a walk toggle, generally upgradeable armor all-around and more. The changelog is up on Enshrouded’s Steam page. 



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/enshroudeds-new-forging-the-path-update-brings-custom-map-sharing-combat-changes-and-more-on-path-to-10-2000137867
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Palia Celebrates 10 Million Players in New Event and Announces Royal Highlands Expansion (With Mounts!)
item.content:encoded:
Palia is celebrating 10 million players, and announcing a brand new expansion coming in May that will add mounts, a new villager, and more.

To celebrate hitting 10 million players, Palia has an event on right now, offering daily quests that give a chance at two free premium mystery outfits. The team is also discounting Founder's Packs and starter packs in the shop. The 10 Million Celebration reward track, has a ton of rewards to claim, including Kilima Coin, outfits, Palcat Plush, recipes, Hugging Chapaas, nameplates, and more.

This event runs through May 11th.

The Royal Highlands expansion arrives on May 12th, and will add horses to Palia, which will be the first-ever mounts. You'll get to take care of and raise your horse on your ranch. There will be new minerals, fish, insects, creatures, and more to discover. A new villager, Echelon, is coming. We’ll learn secrets of the Amber Echo, and have a whole big new area to explore. This expansion will add the largest adventure zone in the game so far.

You’ll get to explore the Royal Highlands and make some discoveries like these and ones the team hasn’t revealed yet. There's a new video covering the  expansion content to give a taste of what is on the way.

After this expansion goes live, we’ll be getting lots more. While there are just a few hints, Sunkissed Summer is coming, with these new seasonal updates set to release new content, expanded progression opportunities, and a few extras tied to the Year of the Riffroc. “Let’s just say… your Ranch may be getting a little more lively,” the announcement blog says. With horses now confirmed to be on the way, time to start speculating.



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/palia-celebrates-10-million-players-in-new-event-and-announces-royal-highlands-expansion-with-mounts-2000137869
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: New Expanded Dead By Daylight x Attack on Titan Collaboration Coming Next Week
item.content:encoded:
Dead By Daylight is no stranger to collaborations, but the latest expands the Attack on Titan collection with a return of the chaos of the 2v8 game mode returning to the Fog.

Attack on Titan has been a fan-favorite collaboration since its debut in 2022. Behaviour Interactive has heard all of the feedback about wanting an expanded collection with more characters, more themes, outfits, and more. So here we go. 

From April 28th-May 19th, the event is back, and with it, the 2v8 Attack on Titan lobby.

As for those characters and outfits, The Trapper gets the Attack Titan Legendary Outfit, so this is going to be a rather towering presence to contend with. New rare survivor outfits include Jake Park as Cleaning Levi, Yui Kimura with Mikasa’s Dark Uniform, and Sasha’s Uniform for Thalita Lyra. Renato Lyra, Adam Francis, Mikaela Reid, and Haddie Kaur also all get the Queen’s Ball Attire Outfit. The Heart of Freedom Outfit will be available for Feng Min and Meg Thomas.

There are lots of things that remain the same, as well as some changes. The round will kick off with two killers with two V8 specific Buffs and nerfs.The Deathslinger gets buffed to improve his performance, while the Oni has a nerf to make him just a little less dominant. The Cage system also gets a few tweaks to help encourage more teamwork and to keep the match pacing.

This time around, the 2v8 map rotation also grows, with Temple of Purgation and Ironworks of Misery adjusted to the mode. 

Naturally, there are also some all-new Attack on Titan rewards. Complete some quests and unlock new loot, including an Attack on Titan badge, a banner, and a new charm.

So, if you’ve been hoping this collaboration would return, you’re in luck. Now to prepare for the chaos.



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/new-expanded-dead-by-daylight-x-attack-on-titan-collaboration-coming-next-week-2000137868
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: LotRO's Rivendell Homesteads, 19th Anniversary Celebrations Coming This Week
item.content:encoded:
Rivendell housing and an anniversary celebration - it's going to be a party of special magnificence in the world of Middle-earth this week. 

It's a busy week for the Lord of the Rings Online team, with multiple updates hitting servers this week. First, we should see A Glorious Hunt arrive on servers on Wednesday at the normal update downtime. Confirmed to be coming this month via the last Producer's Letter, A Glorious Hunt brings the existing storyline in Harad to a conclusion, with the LotRO team looking northward for this year's fall expansion. This will be available for VIP players as part of the normal sub, while free-to-play players can nab it off the LotRO store. 

We will also see the 19th Anniversary celebrations kick off this week, bringing the anniversary events and in-game goodies to the servers. Players will log on starting on Thursday, April 23rd, to a new Anniversary box in their inventory, corresponding to the age of their account. Each box contains rewards such as a new Anniversary character frame, cosmetics, fireworks, and more. 

That same day, the floodgates will open for players to buy their very own Rivendell house, overlooking the Vale of Imladris. The new housing homestead is a premium neighborhood, which means you'll need to get your Writs or Mithril Coins ready to buy into it. But the idea, as detailed in an interview with us last month, would create a smaller, more intimate housing neighborhood. The neighborhood includes sweeping views of Imladris, including Elrond's Last Homely House in the background, and will feature just six houses, including a Kin hall.



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/lotros-rivendell-homesteads-19th-anniversary-celebrations-coming-this-week-2000137866
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Razer's Latest Mouse Mat Is An Ultra-Thin Glass Gaming Mat, And It's Actually Incredible
item.content:encoded:
Razer's latest take on a gaming mouse mat has them revisiting their Atlas line of glass mats, this time with the Atlas Pro. And it's actually incredible.

I've been using the Atlas Pro for a few days now and, as someone who really has only ever used cloth or soft-style mats, this was certainly an eye-opener. The Atlas Pro features high-quality tempered glass supported by a rubber anti-slip base, with the whole mat measuring only 1.9mm thick - slightly thinner than a US nickel. 

The glass panel itself is micro-etched to give the glass texture, which helps with mouse sensors maintaining accurate, responsive control. Yet even with this micro texture, my mouse just glides effortlessly - so much so that I wasn't sure if I would like it at first. It was almost too smooth.

I really like the resistance and friction my rubberized cloth desk mats cause, so the ultra-smooth glide on the Atlas Pro definitely took some adjusting. It's also not a full desk mat, instead just meant to give you a wide surface area for your mouse, letting you make short passes in RPGs or sim games, but wide, sweeping arcs during a tense competitive shooter like Marvel Rivals or Counter-Strike. 

However, after that initial adjustment period, I am finding it hard to go back. Whether I'm using my Razer Basilik, Logitech G502 Pro, or the Razer Viper V4 Pro, the mice just glide. They do, however, make more noise than my normal mat, which, if you're playing games or just using your PC without headphones, it can get slightly annoying. 

The Atlas Pro is also scratch-resistant, thanks to its being rated a 9 on the Mohs hardness scale. This doesn't mean it's scratch-proof, but that it should ward off marks from everyday items like keys, coins, and such. 

The Atlas Pro comes in two colors, Black and White, and is available today on the Razer website starting at $129.99. It's pricey, but if the durability is as it's claimed, this could be the only mouse mat you buy for a while. 

Full Disclosure: The product described was provided by the manufacturer for evaluation purposes.



https://www.mmorpg.com/hardware/razers-latest-mouse-mat-is-an-ultra-thin-glass-gaming-mat-and-its-actually-incredible-2000137865
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Cryptic Studios Releases MMO Roadmaps, Quick Start Event Lets You Claim a Free, High-Level, Geared Character
item.content:encoded:
Cryptic Studios is giving everyone a free, high-level geared and equipped character in STO, Neverwinter, and Champions Online

Christina Gonzalez Updated: Apr 21, 2026 4:27 PM Posted: Apr 21, 2026 4:10 PM ET
Category: News 0

With Cryptic Studios, back under CEO Jack Emmert, and Arc Games have some big announcements for their three MMOs, Star Trek Online, Neverwinter, and Champions Online, including a special “Quick Start” event happening in all three, along with a peek into the future with new roadmaps. They’re also working with tabletop developer Beadle & Grimm for new Star Trek games.

The Quick Start event is intended to be just that, and it's particularly good for returning players, but if you want  to check out one of these games for the first time, that'll work too. From now through May 21st, you can log in and claim a free high level character in all three games. this character will be yours to keep after the event. When you do the high level character will also get a streamlined tutorial, a refresher overall on the game, and you can jump right in.

In Star Trek Online, claim a Tactical Vanguard Jem’Hadar. These were originally added to the game in the popular Victory is Life expansion. They begin at level 60, with high level gear and a fully equipped high-end starship. 

The STO roadmap shows events and updates through September. In May, we’ll get TFO events on PC and console, with a new 5-player version of Crystalline Catastrophe among them. June means summer events, new ships and items. In July, we’ll see the Season 36 update on PC and a Kelvin timeline starship bundle (both on console in August). August and September have TFO events, another new content season, more new ships, and events.

In Neverwinter,  if you have at least one character that has reached level 16, you can claim a free pre-built level 20 Fighter, Cleric, or Wizard. Each one will be set up for the DPS Paragon path as a primary loadout, and you'll get gear, enhancements, boons, companions, mounts, and more along with item level around 60,000.  

On the roadmap, we’ll get Module 33, with a new Adventure Zone, dungeon, HEroic encounters, and more. Protector’s Jubilee will happen in June. And the Summer Festival from mid-August to early September. Later this year, expect M33.5, a dungeon revamp, and inventory and class improvements. 

Finally, in Champions Online, claim a free level 30 Archetype hero from three choices: Behemoth, Icicyle, and Inventor. Here, if you reach level 40 before the event ends you'll also get a free form character slot that you can use to fully customize your hero.

There are new Star Trek tabletop games in the works from Beadle & Grimm. One, Star Trek: Deep Space Nine -Holodeck Homicide, is a murder mystery game, and the other Star Trek: Lower Decks Chaos Protocol, is an escape room game. The team is crowdfunding through Kickstarter to bring both of these games to life and the project was funded in just about 30 minutes. you can check those out here and any updates that come later like stretch goals.

Christina Gonzalez

Christina is MMORPG.COM’s News Editor and a contributor since 2011. Always a fan of great community and wondering if the same sort of magic that was her first guild exists anymore.



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/cryptic-studios-releases-mmo-roadmaps-quick-start-event-lets-you-claim-a-free-high-level-geared-character-2000137864
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
